references.text: Vink, W. 1957. Hamamelidaceae. Flora Malesiana series. 1, 5: 363-379

species.citation: (Hemsl.) P.K.Endress , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 90 (1970) 30; ≡ Sycopsis dunnii Hemsl. , Hooker's Icon. Pl. 29 (1907) t.2836 ; Vink, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 5 (1957) 371. = Sycopsis philippinensis Hemsl. , Hooker's Icon. Pl. 29 (1907) t.2836 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 225.
species.distribution: Borneo, China, Malay Peninsula, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra. LUZON: Bataan, Batangas, Benguet, Ilocos Norte, Isabela, Laguna, Nueva Ecija, Nueva Vizcaya (photos), Quezon, Rizal, MINDORO.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 18 August 2017

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 4c (1909) 263 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 225; Vink, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 5 (1957) 368; Type: BS 739 Foxworthy (L, US, iso), Palawan: Mt Victoria.
species.notes: Along rocky riverbanks and in forests. 50-250m.
